Netflix has a strict policy against sharing accounts. They state that each account is for personal and non-commercial use, and that you're not allowed to share your account with others, even if they live in the same household. If you're caught sharing your account, Netflix may terminate your subscription and ask you to pay for any additional accounts that were created using your login credentials.
If you're caught sharing your account, Netflix may also suspend or terminate your subscription, and you may be asked to pay for any additional accounts that were created using your login credentials.
